title: The Use an LPA and View an LPA services
body: "This leaflet is aimed at organisations who use the online View an LPA service. This may include professionals from:   health services, such as the NHS, GP surgeries and dentists social care, such as care homes, social workers and safeguarding leads financial services, such as banks, building societies and financial advisers   Find out more about how to use View an LPA. "

taxons.title: Lasting power of attorney, being in care and managing finances
